payload.label: faucet
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a chrome metal faucet showing a curved (gooseneck) spout and part of the mounting/base, reflective smooth surface with bright highlights and shadows; the object is edge-cropped and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).
